description_long: This armchair features a broad, boxy silhouette with a high, slightly reclined backrest and wide, flat armrests made of wood. The upholstery is a muted teal fabric with a subtle dotted texture and visible tufted buttons on both the seat and backrest, adding a touch of classic style. The armrests are constructed from a medium-toned wood, providing a sturdy and visually contrasting frame to the soft fabric. The seat is generously proportioned, offering ample space and comfort, while the backrest is tall and supportive. The base of the chair is solid, with no visible legs, giving it a grounded and robust appearance. This design is suitable for public urban spaces such as parks, waiting areas, or community lounges.
description: A wide, teal-upholstered armchair with wooden armrests and a tufted, high backrest. The chair has a solid, grounded base and a classic, comfortable design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick wooden armrest and the depth of the seat and backrest.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the tall, tufted backrest and the wooden frame along the back.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the armrest and seat depth seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the wide seat, tufted buttons, and inviting, open design.
attribute_armrest_design: wide, flat, wooden armrests with a rectangular profile
attribute_backrest_style: tall, straight, and slightly reclined with tufted button detailing
attribute_leg_type: no visible legs; solid base extending to the floor
attribute_upholstery_pattern: tufted fabric with a subtle dotted texture
